results.rendered_html:
sam-ā-√lamb Ā. -lambate, to hang on, cling to (acc.),  MBh. ;  Rājat. ;
to lean on, depend on, trust to (acc.),  Kathās. ;
to take to (acc.),  Cat. ;
to take hold of, seize, grasp,  Kum. ;  Kathās. ;
to have recourse to, assume,  R. ;  Mṛcch. ;  Bhaṭṭ. ;
to acquire, obtain, appropriate,  Hit.  (v.l.);
to fall to the lot of (loc.),  ib.  :
Caus. lambayati, to cause to hang or rest, suspend to (loc.),  Pañcat.
